media:group/media:description: We are exploring Git City, an open-source project that transforms your GitHub profile into a 3D pixel art city. Your contributions determine building height, while your repository count sets the width and your stars light up the windows. It is built with Next.js 15 and Three.js, offering a unique way to visualize your developer journey. Try the flight mode to explore your own digital real estate today.

#GitCity #GitHub #OpenSource

Stay up-to-date on all things GitHub by connecting with us:
